meeting_1.title: Alphabet, Greetings & To Be
meeting_1.materi:
## Alphabet, Greetings & To Be

**To Be** dalam bahasa Inggris digunakan sesuai subjek:

| Subjek | To Be |
|--------|-------|
| I | am |
| You/We/They | are |
| He/She/It | is |

Contoh:
- I **am** a student.
- She **is** a teacher.
- They **are** friends.

Sapaan umum: *Good morning*, *Good afternoon*, *Good evening*, *How are you?*

soal.question: Tulis perkenalan dirimu dalam 5 kalimat menggunakan To Be!

meeting_2.title: Personal Pronouns & Possessive Adjectives
meeting_2.materi:
## Personal Pronouns & Possessive Adjectives

| Subject | Object | Possessive |
|---------|--------|------------|
| I | me | my |
| You | you | your |
| He | him | his |
| She | her | her |
| It | it | its |
| We | us | our |
| They | them | their |

Contoh: **My** name is Andi. This is **her** book.

meeting_3.title: Simple Present Tense
meeting_3.materi:
## Simple Present Tense

Digunakan untuk kebiasaan atau fakta umum.

Rumus: **S + V1 (+s/es untuk He/She/It)**

Contoh:
- I **go** to school every day.
- She **goes** to school every day.

soal.question: Tulis 3 kalimat kebiasaan sehari-harimu memakai simple present tense!

meeting_4.title: Simple Past Tense
meeting_4.materi:
## Simple Past Tense

Digunakan untuk kejadian yang sudah selesai di masa lalu.

Rumus: **S + V2**

Contoh:
- I **watched** a movie yesterday.
- She **went** to Bali last week.

soal.question: Ceritakan kegiatanmu kemarin dalam 5 kalimat memakai simple past tense!

meeting_5.title: Present Continuous Tense
meeting_5.materi:
## Present Continuous Tense

Digunakan untuk kejadian yang sedang berlangsung.

Rumus: **S + to be + V-ing**

Contoh:
- I **am reading** a book now.
- They **are playing** football.

soal.question: Deskripsikan apa yang sedang kamu lakukan sekarang dalam 3 kalimat!

meeting_6.title: Nouns, Articles (a/an/the)
meeting_6.materi:
## Nouns & Articles

**a/an** digunakan untuk benda yang belum spesifik (singular).
**the** digunakan untuk benda yang sudah spesifik/diketahui.

Contoh:
- I have **a** cat.
- **The** cat is sleeping.

soal.question: I saw ___ elephant at the zoo.
Buat 3 kalimat yang menggunakan a, an, dan the!

meeting_7.title: Adjectives & Comparatives
meeting_7.materi:
## Adjectives & Comparatives

Adjective menjelaskan noun. Comparative membandingkan dua hal.

Contoh:
- She is **tall**.
- She is **taller** than her brother.
- This book is **more interesting** than that one.

soal.question: She is ___ (beautiful, comparative) than her sister.
Bandingkan dua kota menggunakan comparative adjective (3 kalimat)!

meeting_8.title: Modal Verbs (can, must, should)
meeting_8.materi:
## Modal Verbs

- **can**: kemampuan/izin
- **must**: keharusan
- **should**: saran

Contoh:
- I **can** swim.
- You **must** wear a helmet.
- You **should** study harder.

soal.question: You ___ study hard to pass the exam.

meeting_9.title: Question Words (WH-Questions)
meeting_9.materi:
## WH-Questions

**What, Where, When, Who, Why, How** digunakan untuk membentuk pertanyaan.

Contoh:
- **What** is your name?
- **Where** do you live?
- **Why** are you late?

soal.question: Buat 5 pertanyaan menggunakan WH-questions yang berbeda!

meeting_10.title: Review & Simple Conversation
meeting_10.materi:
## Review & Simple Conversation

Meeting terakhir untuk merangkum semua materi: To Be, Pronouns, Tenses, Articles, Adjectives, Modal Verbs, dan WH-Questions.

Coba praktikkan percakapan sederhana dengan menggabungkan semua materi sebelumnya!

soal.question: Tulis sebuah percakapan singkat (dialog) 6-8 baris menggunakan minimal 3 materi yang sudah dipelajari!
